This mod can be installed on Exalted Melee Weapons and works on any exalted weapons.
Any damage over time effects from Heavy Attacks will not benefit from Life Strike.
Life Strike works on Gunblade 's heavy attack bullets, allowing lifesteal over a distance.
Life Strike works on Glaive weapons, but only on manually-detonated explosions and heavy attack ground slams.
Explosions from Volatile Quick Return or Volatile Rebound do not work.
While Life Strike can be installed on the Deconstructor ( Prime ), Helios ( Prime ) cannot manually detonate its weapon let alone perform any heavy ground slams and thus cannot gain any benefit.
Does not trigger Archon Intensify when used on exalted weapons such as Excalibur 's Exalted Blade .
